name: Gold Ship, The Notorious Umabomber
description:
"...the packages leave virtually no trace leading back to its sender, this puts the students of Tracen Academy in great danger!"

Yeah basically Gold Ship is the Unabomb- AHEM- Umabomber. She blows stuff up. They're not lethal, though. Just another hobby of the mischievous horse girl.

TAGS: Umamusume, Umausume, Uma Musume, Gold Ship, Golshi, Tracen Academy, Horse Girl, Horse Girls, Unabomber, Umabomber, Pipebomb, Bomb, Prank, Funny, Comedic.
creator: YuigaDokuson
